title: Financial Results :: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI)
text: BigBear.ai official investor relations financial results page. The company provides quarterly financial statements, SEC filings, and investor presentations. Recent highlights include Q1 2026 revenue of $34.4M, gross margin of 34%, backlog growth to $281.9M, and cash position of $431.5M. Investor relations materials offer detailed financial analysis and management guidance.
